_meta.title: Load Diffusion Model - Qwen Image Edit 2511 BF16

inputs.prompt: Transform into anime. Redraw the source character as a high-end glossy semi-realistic anime visual-novel character sprite. This must be a visible full rendering-style conversion, not a light cleanup. Replace the original simple western-cartoon rendering, old linework, old face style, old eye style, old hair rendering, old skin shading, and old clothing shading with a new polished anime illustration style. Keep only the source composition and identity: same adult character, same standing pose, same hand placement, same body orientation, same head angle, same facial expression, same gaze direction, same glasses, same red hair color and general hair shape, same yellow short-sleeve shirt, same red pants, same sprite framing. Do not change the pose. Do not crop the body. Do not add a scene. Output a single isolated character sprite only on a plain white or transparent background. Use clean sharp anime lineart, detailed expressive anime eyes, refined semi-realistic face, smooth skin shading, glossy highlights, detailed hair strands, more realistic fabric folds, polished visual novel key art quality, high-detail modern anime finish.

_meta.title: Positive prompt - aggressive visible style conversion
